summary.intent: Fix Greptile review comments on PR #463 in the moltis repo (html-to-text feature), reply to comments, and resolve all review conversations.
summary.outcome: Fixed two new Greptile comments in web_fetch.rs, committed and pushed the changes, replied to comments, and resolved all open review conversations.

repo: GitHub GraphQL API requires querying for review thread IDs separately — comment node IDs cannot be used directly to resolve threads
PR #463 in moltis-org/moltis is the html-to-text-use-crate feature branch

code.finding: Required fixes: error handling fallback should return empty string (not raw HTML), usize::MAX width replaced with 1_000_000 via builder API, silent errors needed tracing::warn!, link footnotes switched to TrivialDecorator with test added, U+FFFD assertion updated, warn message updated to say 'raw HTML body'

workflow: Resolving GitHub review threads requires the GraphQL resolveReviewThread mutation with thread node IDs, not comment node IDs
Thread IDs must be fetched via a separate GraphQL query (pullRequest.reviewThreads) before they can be resolved

friction: Initial attempt to resolve conversations used comment node IDs instead of thread IDs, requiring an extra GraphQL query to get the correct thread IDs
